zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Norton於1489年出生在英國越可爾馬爾頓時，她的父親Sir John Norton31歲，母親Margaret Warde30歲。她於1521年與Sir William Mallory IV在英國英格蘭越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年6月25日在英國越可爾沃斯享年99歲，埋葬在英國越可爾沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Norton于1489年出生在英国越可爾馬爾頓时，她的父亲Sir John Norton31岁，母亲Margaret Warde30岁。她于1521年与Sir William Mallory IV在英国英格兰越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年6月25日在英国越可爾沃斯享年99岁，埋葬在英国越可爾沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Norton was born in 1489, in Malton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Norton, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Warde, was 30. She married Sir William Mallory IV in 1521, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 25 June 1588, in Wath, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 99, and was buried in Wath, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Norton est née en 1489, à Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Norton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Warde, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Mallory IV en 1521, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juin 1588, à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Norton 1489 in Malton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Norton 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Warde 30. Sie hat 1521 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Mallory IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Juni 1588 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Wath, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Wath, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Norton è nata il nel 1489 nel Malton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Norton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Warde, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Mallory IV nel 1521, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1588, nel Wath, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolta a Wath, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Nortonが1489年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Nortonは31歳，母Margaret Wardeは30歳であった。1521年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでSir William Mallory IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年6月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアワスで99歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Norton(이)가 1489년 영국 요르크실르 맬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Norton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Warde(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리폰에서 Sir William Mallory IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 6월 25일 영국 요르크실르 왓h에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Norton nasceu em 1489, em Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Norton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Warde, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Mallory IV em 1521, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de junho de 1588, em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 99 anos, e foi sepultada em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Norton родилась в 1489 г. в местности малтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Norton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Warde, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Mallory IV в 1521 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 25 июня 1588 г. в местности ват, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности ват, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Norton nació en 1489, en Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Norton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Warde, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir William Mallory IV en 1521, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1588, en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultada en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
